race.comment: ABSTRUSE (1) settled well back last time out before powering home into third on a wet Nowra track. Likely to drift back again from her draw but with a solid tempo anticipated, she can reel them in. DRAMA DODGER (7) doesn't win out of turn but was good fresh when beaten narrowly here in stronger company. Carries more weight this time but deserves following up. ELASTANE MISS (2) returns and has run well fresh without winning. Holds claims for the local barn. MISSED THE MARK (5) has been below his best for a while and was safely held last time out when eighth over 1018m at Werribee four weeks ago. Finds a small field and could place.
